method: Hand-curated entries for models that are required but not yet present in the live APIs (or whose pricing/benchmarks are not yet published). Update as upstream data becomes available.

models.notes: Announced 2026-06-15; API releases 2026-06-16. Listed in the OpenRouter frontend catalog (z-ai/glm-5.2) but per-provider pricing and ArtificialAnalysis benchmarks are not yet published. Offers below are an early indicative estimate based on GLM 5.1 launch pricing and should be refreshed once endpoints go live.

offers.notes: Indicative — mirrors GLM 5.1 launch pricing; replace after 2026-06-16 endpoint launch.
